R

Recipe - Class in assn3
The Recipe class encapsulates all the information related to a cooking recipe.
Recipe() - Constructor for class assn3.Recipe
Constructs an empty Recipe object with default values.
RecipeManager - Class in assn3
The RecipeManager class manages a collection of recipes, providing functionality to load recipes from a file, print shopping lists based on ordered recipes, and generate shopping list files for saving.
RecipeManager() - Constructor for class assn3.RecipeManager
Constructs a new RecipeManager with empty lists for recipes, menu, and shopping list content.
RecipeManagerTest - Class in assn3
The RecipeManagerTest class provides a menu-driven interface for managing recipes, allowing users to view recipes, order them, and generate shopping lists.
RecipeManagerTest() - Constructor for class assn3.RecipeManagerTest
 
recipeName - Variable in class assn3.Recipe
The name of the recipe.
recipeOrder - Variable in class assn3.RecipeManager
The list of recipes ordered by the user.
